title: Daewoo Single Hot Plate Electric Hob – 1500W Portable Hob with Solid Heating Ring, Ideal for Students, Caravans, Camping, Holiday Homes & Small Kitchens
features: Compact Cooking Made Easy – Need a flexible way to cook in small spaces? This 1500W single hot plate gives you a reliable and powerful heat source. Perfect for students, campers, or home emergencies
Fast Heating, Full Control – The solid cast iron plate heats up quickly and retains heat efficiently. Dial in your temperature with the adjustable thermostat for perfect results every time
Built to Travel – Lightweight and slim, this hob fits in backpacks or under counters, ideal for caravans, holiday homes, temporary accommodations, or kitchen makeovers
Safe & Simple Operation – With non-slip rubber feet, overheat protection, and a power indicator light, cooking is worry-free and beginner-friendly
Sleek & Easy to Clean Design – Its modern black housing resists stains and wipes down effortlessly, perfect for everyday use or packing away between trips
